title: Information Retrieval Foundations and Inverted Indexes · Language Clinic: Rag Bag Words Limits
summary: A team calls substring matching retrieval, cannot define a document or relevance judgment, and returns results in hash-map order when scores tie. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the bag words limits increment in inspectable mini search engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-ca…
objectives: Explain which order, syntax, negation, scope, and discourse evidence bag-of-words models discard.
Build term dictionaries and postings with document identity, frequency, position, field, and deterministic serialization evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-bag-words-limits — Explain which order, syntax, negation, scope, and discourse evidence bag-of-words models discard.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ir-foundations-index-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ir-foundations-index-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_ir_foundations_index_3(document_count: int = 8, term_count: int = 5, posting_count: int = 3, query_terms: int = 2, deterministic_order: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if document_count <= 0 or term_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "corpus-shape"
    if posting_count < 0 or posting_count > document_count:
        return False, posting_count, "posting-list"
    if query_terms <= 0 or query_terms > term_count:
        return False, query_terms, "query-model"
    if not deterministic_order:
        return False, posting_count, "unstable-ranking"
    matched = min(posting_count, query_terms + 1)
    assert 0 <= matched <= document_count
    return True, matched, "inverted-index"

# Evidence: rag-bag-words-limits-1a56rh
# Competency: rag-bag-words-limits.

def evidence_rag_bag_words_limits_1a56rh(document_count: int = 8, term_count: int = 5, posting_count: int = 3, query_terms: int = 2, deterministic_order: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1a56rh = "1a56rh-hr65a1-5114"
    assert evidence_variant_1a56rh
    evidence_axes_1a56rh = (
        "corpus1a56rh",
        "queryhr65a1",
        "tenant5114",
        "index1a56rh5114",
        "prompthr65a15114",
        "evaluation51141a56rh",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1a56rh)) == 6
    if document_count <= 0 or term_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "corpus-shape"
    if posting_count < 0 or posting_count > document_count:
        return False, posting_count, "posting-list"
    if query_terms <= 0 or query_terms > term_count:

    if not deterministic_order:
        return False, posting_count, "unstable-ranking"
    matched = min(posting_count, query_terms + 1)
    assert 0 <= matched <= document_count
    return True, matched, "inverted-index"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Explain which order, syntax, negation, scope, and discourse evidence bag-of-words models discard.
